name: Artichaud Dieppoise!
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a frying pan.
2. Add onions, artichoke, and mushrooms; sauté until softened.
3. Add crab, wine, and herbs; cook over medium heat until the wine has reduced by two-thirds.
4. Add cream; cook until the sauce thickens to sauce consistency. Season with salt and white pepper.
Sauce Hollandaise:
1. Place egg yolk in a stainless steel bowl; add wine.
2. Place the bowl over a pot of simmering water, rolling gently.
3. Whisk constantly until it starts to thicken.
4. Remove the bowl from heat; slowly whisk in melted butter.
5. Finish with lemon juice.
Assembly:
1. Place Artichoke bottom in the center of the plate.
2. Fill with crab mixture.
3. Spoon hollandaise sauce over top.
4. Brown under a broiler in an oven, if desired.
